title: 4DR Pack
description: Improve your game performance and add QoL features that do not affect gameplay, but maximize its potential
body:
# 4DR Pack

This pack focuses on bringing more performance to the base game and adding improvements that do not affect the gameplay, but indirectly improve it.

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/6fa909d5-ad2b-42c2-a7ec-1c51f8b6384f.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/4drian3d?r=Mod4DRPack)

## Mods included

### Optimization 
- Lithium
- Sodium
- SodiumExtra
- StarLight
- Krypton
- Immediatelyfast
- FastAnim
- MoreCulling
- EntityCulling
- LanguageReloaded
- DashLoader (Temporarily removed)
- DynamicFPS

### Fixes
- ToolTipFix
- MemoryleakFix (Temporarily removed)
- FerriteCore
- kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric

### Enhancements
- GammaUtils
- LogicalZoom
- JourneyMap
- BetterMountHud 

### Miscellaneous
- Spark
- FabricAPI
- MixinTrace
- Reese Sodium Options
- CraftPresence
- DefaultDarkMode (ResourcePack)
- LogCleaner
- SimpleRepair
- CalcMod
